results.label: all-about-real-estate-houston-49c536df
results.needle: buyer's agent call my client last week
results.commentBody: For me - Dossie pings me on every pending document so nothing sits in my inbox longer than I realize. I get a morning brief each day on what actually needs attention, which sounds simple but it's been huge for staying visible to my clients when things are moving.

results.label: real-estate-in-austin-tx-95a0aa5a
results.needle: for the Texas agent crew - How
results.commentBody: Love the replies - really interesting spread. I built Dossie because I was stuck in the B and C camp for way too long. It auto-calculates every TREC deadline from your contract date, which sounds simple until you realize you've been manually tracking them and definitely missed one.

results.label: boerne-real-estate-3368fd37
results.needle: noticing buyer's agents getting a lot bolder
results.commentBody: Been tracking patterns across my closed deals more carefully lately - Dossie maps every transaction to a pipeline view so I can actually see what's working and what isn't. Makes it way easier to spot when the market's shifting under your feet instead of just feeling it happen.
